title: 13 Hours by Air
writer: Bogart Rogers, Frank Mitchell Dazey, Kenyon Nicholson
actors: Fred MacMurray, Joan Bennett, Zasu Pitts
plot: Airline pilot Jack Gordon (Fred MacMurray) on a flight from New York to San Francisco, is immediately attracted to beautiful passenger Felice Rollins (Joan Bennett). Known as a "lady's man", he bets stewardess Vi Johnson (Ruth Don...
